title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates in AI chips, models, and applications but faces structural disadvantages in power generation and transmission compared to China's centralized grid strategy. China's Eastern Data Western Compute initiative and 1000+ GW data center capacity requirement create a gap that US companies attempt to close through behind-the-meter solutions and regional workarounds like Texas ERCOT.
